scripts.smoke: node -e "const pkg=require('./package.json');const lock=require('./package-lock.json');const expected='14.2.35';const pkgNext=pkg.dependencies&&pkg.dependencies.next;const lockNext=lock.packages&&lock.packages['']&&lock.packages[''].dependencies&&lock.packages[''].dependencies.next;if(pkgNext!==expected||lockNext!==expected){console.error('Next version mismatch: package.json='+pkgNext+', package-lock='+lockNext+', expected='+expected);process.exit(1);}console.log('Next version pin validated at '+expected);"
